description_long: This is a compact, freestanding wooden cabinet with a modern, rectangular design and a gray woodgrain finish. The front features two drawers, each equipped with a round metallic knob, providing accessible storage. The sides display a continuous woodgrain pattern, while the back panel is plain and lighter in color, likely made of a different material for cost efficiency. The top surface is flat and slightly overhangs the body, suitable for placing small items. The overall construction appears sturdy, with clean lines and a subtle decorative curve at the top front edge. This cabinet would be suitable for use in urban interiors such as offices, apartments, or garages.
description: A small, gray woodgrain cabinet with two front drawers and round metallic knobs, featuring a flat top and sturdy construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers with round metallic knobs and a subtle decorative curve at the top edge.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the continuous gray woodgrain pattern and the overhanging top surface.
description_view_2: Back view with a plain, light-colored panel, lacking any decorative features or hardware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the left side with the same woodgrain texture and overhanging top.
